leagueBriefing: A night of absolute carnage in the Champions League saw European heavyweights flex their muscles in devastating fashion. While Barcelona's seven-goal explosion grabbed the headlines, Liverpool and Bayern München clinical shutouts signaled a clear warning to the rest of the continent as the knockout stages intensify.

games.headline: Barcelona humiliates Newcastle in historic seven-goal masterclass
games.brief: Barcelona delivered a haunting performance at the Camp Nou, systematically dismantling a Newcastle side that looked completely out of its depth. The Blaugrana's fluid attacking play was unstoppable, marking one of the highest-scoring single-game performances in the modern era of the competition.
bullets: Barcelona scored four goals in a blistering 20-minute span during the first half.
Robert Lewandowski and Lamine Yamal both recorded braces in the rout.
Newcastle’s defense surrendered more goals in this single match than in their previous four UCL games combined.
The nine total goals fell just short of the all-time Champions League record for a single match (12).
games.context: This result effectively secures Barcelona's progression and serves as a statement of intent to the other title contenders.

highlights.title: Barcelona vs. Newcastle United: Extended Highlights | UCL Round of 16 - Leg 2 | CBS Sports Golazo

games.headline: Spurs edge Atlético in chaotic five-goal thriller
games.brief: In a clash of contrasting styles, Tottenham’s high-octane offense eventually wore down Diego Simeone’s disciplined Atlético defense. It was a game of shifts and momentum, with Spurs finding a late winner to take a narrow but crucial advantage into the second leg of this heavyweight encounter.
bullets: Heung-min Son scored the decisive goal in the 82nd minute following a rapid counter-attack.
Atlético Madrid uncharacteristically conceded twice from set-pieces.
Spurs recorded 65% possession, their highest against a top-tier Spanish opponent in years.
The match saw nine yellow cards as tempers flared in a physical second half.
games.context: Spurs lead the tie, but Atlético's two away goals mean the return leg in Madrid remains on a knife-edge.

highlights.title: Tottenham vs. Atlético Madrid: Extended Highlights | UCL Round of 16 - Leg 2 | CBS Sports Golazo

games.headline: Clinical Liverpool cruise past Galatasaray at Anfield
games.brief: Liverpool made light work of the Turkish champions, putting on a professional display that emphasized the gap in quality between the two sides. From the opening whistle, the Reds pressed high and never allowed Galatasaray to settle, resulting in a clean sheet and a mountain for the visitors to climb in the return leg.
bullets: Mohamed Salah reached a new milestone for European goals scored at Anfield.
Liverpool’s midfield restricted Galatasaray to zero shots on target throughout the match.
The victory extends Liverpool's unbeaten home streak in European competition to 15 matches.
Three of the four goals were assisted by Liverpool’s full-backs, highlighting their tactical dominance out wide.
games.context: With a four-goal cushion, Liverpool looks almost certain to advance to the next round.

highlights.title: Liverpool vs. Galatasaray: Extended Highlights | UCL Round of 16 - Leg 2 | CBS Sports Golazo

games.headline: Bayern overpower Atalanta as Kane shines in Munich
games.brief: Bayern München’s relentless attacking machinery proved too much for Atalanta’s adventurous style. While the Italian side managed to find the net, they were ultimately overwhelmed by Bayern’s clinical finishing and superior physical presence, leaving the Bundesliga giants in a commanding position.
bullets: Harry Kane scored a trademark header and provided an assist in a Man of the Match performance.
Atalanta briefly made it 2-1 before Bayern pulled away with two goals in five minutes.
Bayern has now scored 3+ goals in every home Champions League game this season.
Manuel Neuer made two spectacular saves early in the match to prevent an Atalanta upset.
games.context: Bayern heads to Italy with a comfortable three-goal lead, firmly in control of the tie.

highlights.title: Bayern Munich vs. Atalanta: Extended Highlights | UCL Round of 16 - Leg 2 | CBS Sports Golazo
